<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const select = document.getElementById("disfoil-chat-whatsapp");

  if (select) {
    const options = select.querySelectorAll("option");

    // VENDAS
    if (options[1]) {
      options[1].value = "19936196136";
      options[1].textContent = "Vendas";
    }

    // SAC
    if (options[2]) {
      options[2].value = "19996919705";
      options[2].textContent = "Sac";
    }

    // FINANCEIRO
    if (options[3]) {
      options[3].value = "19987161354";
      options[3].textContent = "Financeiro";
    }
  }
});
</script>
